features.name: Interactive Function Chain Designer
features.description: A visual app for composing Datagrok functions into executable pipelines. Users drag and drop functions onto a canvas, connect them, and run the chain interactively.
features.evidence_summary: func:Flow:Flow is tagged 'app' with description 'Interactive function chain designer'; the readme and changelog entry both reference the FuncFlow view and its drop-handler.

features.name: Flow Definition File Viewer
features.description: Opens and renders .ffjson flow-definition files as an interactive flow diagram inside the Datagrok platform.
features.evidence_summary: func:Flow:viewFuncFlow is registered as a fileViewer for 'ffjson', the serialization format produced by the Flow chain-designer app.
